---
name: AI-ready feature or fix
about: Framed so an agent (Claude, Codex) can take it all the way to PR via the dev workflow.
title: "[AI-READY] <one-line outcome>"
labels: [ai-ready]
---

## Intent
_What the user can do after this ships, in one sentence. No implementation language._

## Done when
- [ ] _Observable behavior #1 a human or script can verify_
- [ ] _Observable behavior #2_
- [ ] _Observable behavior #3_

## Constraints
- _API surface / IPC contract / kube safety / perf / security constraint the agent must respect_
- _Files or systems that are off-limits_

## Entry points
- _Pointers to the modules most likely to change. If you don't know, delete this section — the plan phase will discover them._

## Non-goals
- _Explicitly out of scope for this issue_
